name: read_lines
description: Read a specific line range from a source file in the repository. Use this when you know the exact file and line numbers from a previous tool result (e.g. a grep hit or a call-graph entry) and need the surrounding context.

file_path.description: Relative path from the repository root (e.g. 'src/wiedunflow/adapters/openai_provider.py'). Must be an existing file.

start.description: 1-based line number of the first line to read (inclusive).

end.description: 1-based line number of the last line to read (inclusive). Maximum window is 200 lines to keep context manageable.
